textByHash.4e4e03f39d682468080734b00e10c08d9c75fdd3: Try not to burn this one.
textByHash.70bfb5e115586367e05b418a7e2949e9a8fafb56: Yes, you are most welcome to cook here. You may find you burn food less often under my supervision.
textByHash.83c41c0ec4bccb6d66d64202f4a22fb54e6d483e: Much of the income of Hosidius derives from trade in cooked food, so our work is vital.
textByHash.e192d5c14b8225099de0a7b1f85ca6c872212bf4: What do you want? I am busy supervising!
textByHash.eeed16009c5c99c19ed8ab75b15812db1b68edaa: Excuse me? My cooking level is higher than you could imagine - I have already done my share of the work. Now, with my expertise, I am guiding future generations of chefs.
textByHash.f24459a76999d6f3725cc77e19b2e07e52870f23: This is the Hosidius Kitchen. Here, under my expert eye, we prepare the food that feeds most of the population.
